creator: fred@fredcondo.net
text: mailwrapper (8) states that its configuration "is kept in ${LOCALBASE}/etc/mail/mailer.conf or /etc/mail/mailer.conf" and this actually worked in 13.2. 14.0 seems to heed only /etc/mail/mailer.conf, which violates the principle of least astonishment and is contrary to the documentation.
